TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Guyana, title = Guyana, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Guyana} }

S.FORM: = Guyana = Gaga kska Kska- Hunac Meycow ka Guyana, 5 00 N, 59 00 W ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 214,969 sq km(hangan na o Tg85)(knlbanga dxgal o 196,849 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 18,120 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 735,909 hiyi. Gaga Georgetown ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 23 idas 2 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Guyana ga wada sugan 8.40% ka dxgal qpahan, 77.40% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 14.20% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka David A. Granger, pnaah hngkawas2015 idas 5 jiyax 16pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Kaiyana konhoko (ego:Cooperative Republic of Guyana)kesun daha Kaiyana, ga menag tgubaro Nanmeco, ano heya kocia runmego ego ma kari daha pkrahan menag Nanmeco, ga tgimah Tainkose duri. Tgunarat siyo na Surinan, tguhunag sndalin Pasi, tguirin we sndarin wenezuela, tgubaro we Yayun tasiyan. Kaiyana ma Srinan dahaka Wenezuela nikan prungagun ayus alang daha. Deheran tgunarat yayun Isoqepo-Sisukaiyana purugangun riun na Wenezuela naku kana duheran kiya mesa (2/3 deheran Kaiyana knguheti na)Aninag ga menag Nanmeco ka Kaiyana, ga teheyag Nanmeco Kociarenmon, anisa ndan tngesa rudan dahaka pnatis Risu rumaban mntena dahaka kkualang ga menag Icirun Ciaropihai. Risu knkawas 1498 Koristofu. Korun puplaale smudian Kaiyana dahaka ssio kana alang, bobo na pladin meyah menag ka seedig kndalah Yuropa. bobo na 3 Suci de Inko, Horan, Faransu sururiyuh dumoi kmurahan, seediq snkrinu bnarui na kndalah Feco meyah gnbgurah, knkawas 1834 wada pulahun ka gaya pnskurinu de, mosa migin ninpu pila tikoh dehug berah 19 suci knkawas 1814 Inko,Fransu,Horan teru koka ni moda matis prungagan, Kaiyana de Inko moda kmurahan, tguyangun daha Insukaiyana. Knkawas 1961dmoi nag kmurahan, priyuh ngayan kaiyana(Guyana). Knkawas 1966 idas 5 ali 26 turi, klnkawas 1970 idas 2 ali 23 securicu Kaiyanahoco konhoko. Knbharo heyi seediq Kaiyana rrumiku mmaku, ini khubaro ka heyi seedig yehari so 80 man, Inko kmurahan ciida han we migin kndalah Nanya seediq Intu dahaka seediq kndalah Tonnaya, spatis na keyaku kana kkpahun, kiyaka Kaiyana de nonye dahaka kuanye na zuto haten, sokiyaka egu ruramu ini pskinngan seedig ka suupu menag alang Kaiyana. Yebale 39% rutu seedig Intu 29% ka rutu Feco, 19% we rtu pngimah Intu dahaka Feco,10% seediq tnduheran,Fayi dahaka rtu Oco(yeba0.5%). Tiri Ga menag tgubar deheran Nameco, tgubaro na we ssio icirun Tasiyan, tgunarat we Srinan, tguhunag we rmutu Pasi, tguirin sndarin Wenezuera. Sincuncifa 10 sincuncifa ka kaiyana. Nikan Mincuweyen kmurahan knkingan sincunci, sseki ka bukn na kmurahan. Cinci Caicun socu: swezu we 28,700 man yen pila dame; swecu we 30,700 man Yen pila dame(knkawas 2004). Scuconcu we: 4.994 iku pila dame (kunkawas 2007); suzuconcu: 8.358 iku pila dame(knkawas 2007). Kyukeya brigun na alang icin we: Tefantu,sato,borun,khuni,kin Ma beras. Bnrigan desun alang we; cupencai,zanriau,kikayi,faseyiapin,ciencia ma siafepin. Kuri gunbarui na koka we; mkuri gunbarui mntena kingan heyi ciaropi, gnbarui kuri Meko,Inko ma Cianata. Kuri pnyahan na bburigun we: Meko,Inko ma Cianata. Pnyahan pnatas CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: = gujana = gaga kska kska- ńßuna ¶ m…ô ¶ow ka gujana, * ** n, ** ** w ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŇčan na o ***,*** sq km(ńßaŇčan na o tg**)(knlbaŇča dxgal o ***,*** sq km, knlbaŇčan qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka s…ô…üiqun o niqan ***,*** ńßiji. gaga g…ôo…ĺg…ôtown ka pusu alaŇč pa…ĺu, …üijax ** idas * ka …üijax sk…ĺajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal gujana ga wada sugan *.**% ka dxgal qpańßan, **.**% ka dxgal bbuju, …ĺańßuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŇč klwaan ta sajaŇč o kija ka da*id a. g…ĺaŇč…ô…ĺ, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas**** idas * …üijax **pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ¶inkńßulan sa knita' sa b…ĺbi…ĺu' kaijana konńßoko (…ôgo: ¶oop…ô…ĺati*…ô …ĺ…ôpubli ¶ o* gujana)k…ôsun dańßa kaijana, ga m…ônag tguba…ĺo nanm…ô ¶o, ano ńß…ôa ko ¶ia …ĺunm…ôgo …ôgo ma ka…ĺi dańßa pk…ĺańßan m…ônag nanm…ô ¶o, ga tgimańß tainkos…ô du…ĺi. tguna…ĺat sijo na su…ĺinan, tguńßunag sndalin pasi, tgui…ĺin w…ô snda…ĺin w…ôn…ô*u…ôla, tguba…ĺo w…ô jajun tasijan. kaijana ma s…ĺinan dańßaka w…ôn…ô*u…ôla nikan p…ĺuŇčagun ajus alaŇč dańßa. d…ôńß…ô…ĺan tguna…ĺat jajun isoq…ôpo-sisukaijana pu…ĺugaŇčun …ĺiun na w…ôn…ô*u…ôla naku kana duńß…ô…ĺan kija m…ôsa (*/* d…ôńß…ô…ĺan kaijana kŇčuńß…ôti na)aninag ga m…ônag nanm…ô ¶o ka kaijana, ga t…ôńß…ôag nanm…ô ¶o ko ¶ia…ĺ…ônmon, anisa ndan tŇč…ôsa …ĺudan dańßaka pnatis …ĺisu …ĺumaban mnt…ôna dańßaka kkualaŇč ga m…ônag i ¶i…ĺun ¶ia…ĺopińßai. …ĺisu knkawas **** ko…ĺisto*u. ko…ĺun puplaal…ô smudian kaijana dańßaka ssio kana alaŇč, bobo na pladin m…ôańß m…ônag ka s…ô…ôdig kndalańß ju…ĺopa. bobo na * su ¶i d…ô inko, ńßo…ĺan, *a…ĺansu su…ĺu…ĺijuńß dumoi kmu…ĺańßan, s…ô…ôdiq snk…ĺinu bna…ĺui na kndalańß *…ô ¶o m…ôańß gnbgu…ĺańß, knkawas **** wada pulańßun ka gaja pnsku…ĺinu d…ô, mosa migin ninpu pila tikońß d…ôńßug b…ô…ĺańß ** su ¶i knkawas **** inko,*…ĺansu,ńßo…ĺan t…ô…ĺu koka ni moda matis p…ĺuŇčagan, kaijana d…ô inko moda kmu…ĺańßan, tgujaŇčun dańßa insukaijana. knkawas ****dmoi nag kmu…ĺańßan, p…ĺijuńß Ňčajan kaijana(gujana). knkawas **** idas * ali ** tu…ĺi, klnkawas **** idas * ali ** s…ô ¶u…ĺi ¶u kaijanańßo ¶o konńßoko. knbńßa…ĺo ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdiq kaijana …ĺ…ĺumiku mmaku, ini kńßuba…ĺo ka ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdig j…ôńßa…ĺi so ** man, inko kmu…ĺańßan ¶iida ńßan w…ô migin kndalańß nanja s…ô…ôdiq intu dańßaka s…ô…ôdiq kndalańß tonnaja, spatis na k…ôaku kana kkpańßun, kijaka kaijana d…ô nonj…ô dańßaka kuanj…ô na *uto ńßat…ôn, sokijaka …ôgu …ĺu…ĺamu ini pskinŇčan s…ô…ôdig ka suupu m…ônag alaŇč kaijana. j…ôbal…ô **% …ĺutu s…ô…ôdig intu **% ka …ĺutu *…ô ¶o, **% w…ô …ĺtu pŇčimańß intu dańßaka *…ô ¶o,**% s…ô…ôdiq tnduńß…ô…ĺan,*aji dańßaka …ĺtu o ¶o(j…ôba*.*%). ti…ĺi ga m…ônag tguba…ĺ d…ôńß…ô…ĺan nam…ô ¶o, tguba…ĺo na w…ô ssio i ¶i…ĺun tasijan, tguna…ĺat w…ô s…ĺinan, tguńßunag w…ô …ĺmutu pasi, tgui…ĺin snda…ĺin w…ôn…ô*u…ô…ĺa. sin ¶un ¶i*a ** sin ¶un ¶i*a ka kaijana. nikan min ¶uw…ô…ôn kmu…ĺańßan knkiŇčan sin ¶un ¶i, ss…ôki ka bukn na kmu…ĺańßan. ¶in ¶i ¶ai ¶un so ¶u: sw…ô*u w…ô **,*** man j…ôn pila dam…ô; sw…ô ¶u w…ô **,*** man j…ôn pila dam…ô(knkawas ****). s ¶u ¶on ¶u w…ô: *.*** iku pila dam…ô (kunkawas ****); su*u ¶on ¶u: *.*** iku pila dam…ô(knkawas ****). kjuk…ôa b…ĺigun na alaŇč i ¶in w…ô: t…ô*antu,sato,bo…ĺun,kńßuni,kin ma b…ô…ĺas. bn…ĺigan d…ôsun alaŇč w…ô; ¶up…ôn ¶ai,*an…ĺiau,kikaji,*as…ôiapin, ¶i…ôn ¶ia ma sia*…ôpin. ku…ĺi gunba…ĺui na koka w…ô; mku…ĺi gunba…ĺui mnt…ôna kiŇčan ńß…ôi ¶ia…ĺopi, gnba…ĺui ku…ĺi m…ôko,inko ma ¶ianata. ku…ĺi pnjańßan na bbu…ĺigun w…ô: m…ôko,inko ma ¶ianata. pnjańßan pnatas ¶ia ***
S.FORM: = Guyana = Gaga kska Kska- Hunac Meycow ka Guyana, 5 00 N, 59 00 W ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 214,969 sq km(hangan na o Tg85)(knlbanga dxgal o 196,849 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 18,120 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 735,909 hiyi. Gaga Georgetown ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 23 idas 2 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Guyana ga wada sugan 8.40% ka dxgal qpahan, 77.40% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 14.20% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka David A. Granger, pnaah hngkawas2015 idas 5 jiyax 16pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Kaiyana konhoko (ego:Cooperative Republic of Guyana)kesun daha Kaiyana, ga menag tgubaro Nanmeco, ano heya kocia runmego ego ma kari daha pkrahan menag Nanmeco, ga tgimah Tainkose duri. Tgunarat siyo na Surinan, tguhunag sndalin Pasi, tguirin we sndarin wenezuela, tgubaro we Yayun tasiyan. Kaiyana ma Srinan dahaka Wenezuela nikan prungagun ayus alang daha. Deheran tgunarat yayun Isoqepo-Sisukaiyana purugangun riun na Wenezuela naku kana duheran kiya mesa (2/3 deheran Kaiyana knguheti na)Aninag ga menag Nanmeco ka Kaiyana, ga teheyag Nanmeco Kociarenmon, anisa ndan tngesa rudan dahaka pnatis Risu rumaban mntena dahaka kkualang ga menag Icirun Ciaropihai. Risu knkawas 1498 Koristofu. Korun puplaale smudian Kaiyana dahaka ssio kana alang, bobo na pladin meyah menag ka seedig kndalah Yuropa. bobo na 3 Suci de Inko, Horan, Faransu sururiyuh dumoi kmurahan, seediq snkrinu bnarui na kndalah Feco meyah gnbgurah, knkawas 1834 wada pulahun ka gaya pnskurinu de, mosa migin ninpu pila tikoh dehug berah 19 suci knkawas 1814 Inko,Fransu,Horan teru koka ni moda matis prungagan, Kaiyana de Inko moda kmurahan, tguyangun daha Insukaiyana. Knkawas 1961dmoi nag kmurahan, priyuh ngayan kaiyana(Guyana). Knkawas 1966 idas 5 ali 26 turi, klnkawas 1970 idas 2 ali 23 securicu Kaiyanahoco konhoko. Knbharo heyi seediq Kaiyana rrumiku mmaku, ini khubaro ka heyi seedig yehari so 80 man, Inko kmurahan ciida han we migin kndalah Nanya seediq Intu dahaka seediq kndalah Tonnaya, spatis na keyaku kana kkpahun, kiyaka Kaiyana de nonye dahaka kuanye na zuto haten, sokiyaka egu ruramu ini pskinngan seedig ka suupu menag alang Kaiyana. Yebale 39% rutu seedig Intu 29% ka rutu Feco, 19% we rtu pngimah Intu dahaka Feco,10% seediq tnduheran,Fayi dahaka rtu Oco(yeba0.5%). Tiri Ga menag tgubar deheran Nameco, tgubaro na we ssio icirun Tasiyan, tgunarat we Srinan, tguhunag we rmutu Pasi, tguirin sndarin Wenezuera. Sincuncifa 10 sincuncifa ka kaiyana. Nikan Mincuweyen kmurahan knkingan sincunci, sseki ka bukn na kmurahan. Cinci Caicun socu: swezu we 28,700 man yen pila dame; swecu we 30,700 man Yen pila dame(knkawas 2004). Scuconcu we: 4.994 iku pila dame (kunkawas 2007); suzuconcu: 8.358 iku pila dame(knkawas 2007). Kyukeya brigun na alang icin we: Tefantu,sato,borun,khuni,kin Ma beras. Bnrigan desun alang we; cupencai,zanriau,kikayi,faseyiapin,ciencia ma siafepin. Kuri gunbarui na koka we; mkuri gunbarui mntena kingan heyi ciaropi, gnbarui kuri Meko,Inko ma Cianata. Kuri pnyahan na bburigun we: Meko,Inko ma Cianata. Pnyahan pnatas CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

o **,*** sq km). kana ka s…ô…üiqun o niqan ***,*** ńßiji. gaga g…ôo…ĺg…ôtown ka pusu alaŇč pa…ĺu, …üijax ** idas * ka …üijax sk…ĺajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal gujana ga wada sugan *.**% ka dxgal qpańßan, **.**% ka dxgal bbuju, …ĺańßuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŇč klwaan ta sajaŇč o kija ka da*id a. g…ĺaŇč…ô…ĺ, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas**** idas * …üijax **pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ¶inkńßulan sa knita' sa b…ĺbi…ĺu' kaijana konńßoko (…ôgo: ¶oop…ô…ĺati*…ô …ĺ…ôpubli ¶ o* gujana)k…ôsun dańßa kaijana, ga m…ônag tguba…ĺo nanm…ô ¶o, ano ńß…ôa ko ¶ia …ĺunm…ôgo …ôgo ma ka…ĺi dańßa pk…ĺańßan m…ônag nanm…ô ¶o, ga tgimańß tainkos…ô du…ĺi. tguna…ĺat sijo na su…ĺinan, tguńßunag sndalin pasi, tgui…ĺin w…ô snda…ĺin w…ôn…ô*u…ôla, tguba…ĺo w…ô jajun tasijan. kaijana ma s…ĺinan dańßaka w…ôn…ô*u…ôla nikan p…ĺuŇčagun ajus alaŇč dańßa. d…ôńß…ô…ĺan tguna…ĺat jajun isoq…ôpo-sisukaijana pu…ĺugaŇčun …ĺiun na w…ôn…ô*u…ôla naku kana duńß…ô…ĺan kija m…ôsa (*/* d…ôńß…ô…ĺan kaijana kŇčuńß…ôti na)aninag ga m…ônag nanm…ô ¶o ka kaijana, ga t…ôńß…ôag nanm…ô ¶o ko ¶ia…ĺ…ônmon, anisa ndan tŇč…ôsa …ĺudan dańßaka pnatis …ĺisu …ĺumaban mnt…ôna dańßaka kkualaŇč ga m…ônag i ¶i…ĺun ¶ia…ĺopińßai. …ĺisu knkawas **** ko…ĺisto*u. ko…ĺun puplaal…ô smudian kaijana dańßaka ssio kana alaŇč, bobo na pladin m…ôańß m…ônag ka s…ô…ôdig kndalańß ju…ĺopa. bobo na * su ¶i d…ô inko, ńßo…ĺan, *a…ĺansu su…ĺu…ĺijuńß dumoi kmu…ĺańßan, s…ô…ôdiq snk…ĺinu bna…ĺui na kndalańß *…ô ¶o m…ôańß gnbgu…ĺańß, knkawas **** wada pulańßun ka gaja pnsku…ĺinu d…ô, mosa migin ninpu pila tikońß d…ôńßug b…ô…ĺańß ** su ¶i knkawas **** inko,*…ĺansu,ńßo…ĺan t…ô…ĺu koka ni moda matis p…ĺuŇčagan, kaijana d…ô inko moda kmu…ĺańßan, tgujaŇčun dańßa insukaijana. knkawas ****dmoi nag kmu…ĺańßan, p…ĺijuńß Ňčajan kaijana(gujana). knkawas **** idas * ali ** tu…ĺi, klnkawas **** idas * ali ** s…ô ¶u…ĺi ¶u kaijanańßo ¶o konńßoko. knbńßa…ĺo ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdiq kaijana …ĺ…ĺumiku mmaku, ini kńßuba…ĺo ka ńß…ôi s…ô…ôdig j…ôńßa…ĺi so ** man, inko kmu…ĺańßan ¶iida ńßan w…ô migin kndalańß nanja s…ô…ôdiq intu dańßaka s…ô…ôdiq kndalańß tonnaja, spatis na k…ôaku kana kkpańßun, kijaka kaijana d…ô nonj…ô dańßaka kuanj…ô na *uto ńßat…ôn, sokijaka …ôgu …ĺu…ĺamu ini pskinŇčan s…ô…ôdig ka suupu m…ônag alaŇč kaijana. j…ôbal…ô **% …ĺutu s…ô…ôdig intu **% ka …ĺutu *…ô ¶o, **% w…ô …ĺtu pŇčimańß intu dańßaka *…ô ¶o,**% s…ô…ôdiq tnduńß…ô…ĺan,*aji dańßaka …ĺtu o ¶o(j…ôba*.*%). ti…ĺi ga m…ônag tguba…ĺ d…ôńß…ô…ĺan nam…ô ¶o, tguba…ĺo na w…ô ssio i ¶i…ĺun tasijan, tguna…ĺat w…ô s…ĺinan, tguńßunag w…ô …ĺmutu pasi, tgui…ĺin snda…ĺin w…ôn…ô*u…ô…ĺa. sin ¶un ¶i*a ** sin ¶un ¶i*a ka kaijana. nikan min ¶uw…ô…ôn kmu…ĺańßan knkiŇčan sin ¶un ¶i, ss…ôki ka bukn na kmu…ĺańßan. ¶in ¶i ¶ai ¶un so ¶u: sw…ô*u w…ô **,*** man j…ôn pila dam…ô; sw…ô ¶u w…ô **,*** man j…ôn pila dam…ô(knkawas ****). s ¶u ¶on ¶u w…ô: *.*** iku pila dam…ô (kunkawas ****); su*u ¶on ¶u: *.*** iku pila dam…ô(knkawas ****). kjuk…ôa b…ĺigun na alaŇč i ¶in w…ô: t…ô*antu,sato,bo…ĺun,kńßuni,kin ma b…ô…ĺas. bn…ĺigan d…ôsun alaŇč w…ô; ¶up…ôn ¶ai,*an…ĺiau,kikaji,*as…ôiapin, ¶i…ôn ¶ia ma sia*…ôpin. ku…ĺi gunba…ĺui na koka w…ô; mku…ĺi gunba…ĺui mnt…ôna kiŇčan ńß…ôi ¶ia…ĺopi, gnba…ĺui ku…ĺi m…ôko,inko ma ¶ianata. ku…ĺi pnjańßan na bbu…ĺigun w…ô: m…ôko,inko ma ¶ianata. pnjańßan pnatas ¶ia ***
